title: Clinical trials
lead: Trials we have catalogued for these conditions, with their recruitment status and sites. GeneGuidelines does not run recruitment — every card links to the official ClinicalTrials.gov record for eligibility and contact details.
diseaseSearchPlaceholder: Filter by disease — name, gene, OMIM…
emptyUnknownDiseaseSuffix: to build the evidence base for this condition.
emptyNoMatches: No trials match the current filters. Try a different status, phase, or distance.
provenance: Trial records are catalogued from ClinicalTrials.gov and may lag the registry. Always confirm status, eligibility, and contact details on the official record.
mapNote: OpenStreetMap tiles · markers cluster when zoomed out. Click a pin for the registry link.
